meaning: n.陶制盖碗,陶制盖碗食品,(烧菜兼上菜用的)沙锅
examples: A special set dinner, with goose liver terrine, scallop, Turkey, cheese and Yule log will be load at 480 Rmb. French Champagne will be at the special price of 480 per bottle and 80 per glasses.
The pork-liver terrine, a wedge the size of a cassette, wears a dollop of fennel marmalade.
Has the depth of meaty essence ever underpinned a mixed-meat terrine so?
Sprinkle the slices of terrine with the parmigiano and serve immediately.
